queries.question: Show me the functions each traffic management center uses.
queries.sql: SELECT Functions.functionName  from Traffic_Management_Centers_Functions join Functions on Traffic_Management_Centers_Functions.Function_id = Functions.id join Traffic_Management_Centers on Traffic_Management_Centers_Functions.TMC_id = Traffic_Management_Centers.centerID   GROUP BY Traffic_Management_Centers_Functions.Function_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Traffic_Management_Centers_Functions.TMC_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Traffic_Management_Centers)

queries.question: Show me the functions each traffic management center uses.
queries.sql: select traffic_management_centers.name , functions.functionname from Traffic_Management_Centers_Functions join Functions on Traffic_Management_Centers_Functions.Function_id = Functions.id join Traffic_Management_Centers on Traffic_Management_Centers_Functions.TMC_id = Traffic_Management_Centers.centerID
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/traffic/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?functionname WHERE {
  ?traffic_management_centers_functions a :Traffic_Management_Centers_Functions .
  ?functions a :Function .
  ?traffic_management_centers_functions p:hasFunction ?functions .
  ?traffic_management_centers a :Traffic_Management_Centers .
  ?traffic_management_centers_functions p:hasTraffic_Management_Centers ?traffic_management_centers .
  ?traffic_management_centers p:name ?name .
  ?functions p:name ?functionname .
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me the functions each traffic management center uses.
